title: Tab Toggle
description: Allows you to toggle tab, rather than having to hold a key down
body: Allows you to toggle the player list rather than having to hold down a key. Useful for servers like hoplite, where health is displayed in tab. You can pair this with https://modrinth.com/mod/tabtweaks to disable headers/footers, which is useful in servers like hoplite where health is shown in tab.
